ab: maglu kuwing ki yaya’ musa’ magunawu’ cu sawni’.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: mataseq a kaal cu qaliyan, ini’ kagihaaq, ini’ uwi uw kakilux, mashahiyaw a bayhu.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: asi cami pasisamag ca rawq i maneq cu miyenpaw, halhul tagacbu’ ca hihihi’ ku wagi’.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.

ab: matanah a kaal la cu minaneq la.
en: In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: paqucan mu i yaya’ mha : “micuwa’ ka matanah a kaal la?”
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ab: kumaal i yaya’ maha, “kiiy ma’uwah a rahuwal ka bayhu la.”
ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: ukas a hamhum ca kaal cu gabiyan, pakahtu a buliqu la.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: mausa’ cami i imuwag uwi la.
sikaal mu cuku buliqu ku kisleq mu cu muwah kuwing imuwag maha,
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願，
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: “muwa’ na iqaat ma’uwah a bayhu ka mamati’, mausa’ kuwing i magunawu’ lawwi.”
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
